description: chromodomain helicase DNA binding protein 4 [Source:HGNC Symbol;Acc:HGNC:1919]
ciliary_role: In vitro pooled CRISPR interference screen to identify CHD genes disrupting NPC biology and identified 45 CHD genes. A cluster of ASD and CHD genes are enriched for ciliary biology, and perturbing any one of seven such genes (CEP290, CHD4, KMT2E, NSD1, OFD1, RFX3 and TAOK1) impairs primary cilia formation in vitro(PMID: 40552535).

ai_summary.basic_summary: CHD4 is a ciliary gene encoding chromodomain helicase dna binding protein 4 [source:hgnc symbol;acc:hgnc:1919]
